description: Solar & battery investment ROI tracking — payback progress, cumulative savings, projected dates

panels.title: Solar Cost
panels.description: Total solar system investment (7.4kW panels + 6kW Fronius, Dec 2022)

panels.title: Solar Savings (Data)
panels.description: Total solar savings from available IoTaWatt data (since Jan 2024)

panels.title: Solar Savings (Est. Total)
panels.description: Estimated total solar savings since install (Dec 2022), extrapolated using daily average from data period

panels.title: Solar Daily Avg
panels.description: Average daily solar savings (self-consumption value + export credits)

panels.title: Solar Payback
panels.description: Percentage of $6,400 solar investment recovered through savings

panels.title: Solar Payback Date
panels.description: Estimated date when cumulative solar savings exceed system cost

panels.title: Cumulative Solar Savings
panels.description: Running total of monthly solar savings (self-consumption + export credits)

panels.title: Cumulative Savings Over Time
panels.description: Monthly cumulative solar savings from IoTaWatt data. Battery savings will overlay once sigenergy2mqtt is active.

panels.title: Battery Savings
panels.description: Total battery savings since install (discharge value − charge cost at TOU rates)

panels.title: Battery Daily Avg
panels.description: Average daily battery savings (grid import avoided at TOU rates)

panels.title: Battery Payback
panels.description: Percentage of $12,000 battery investment recovered through savings

panels.title: Battery Payback Date
panels.description: Estimated date when cumulative battery savings exceed system cost

panels.title: Combined Payback
panels.description: Percentage of total $18,400 investment recovered. Solar savings extrapolated from install date, battery savings from actual data.

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
import "array"
import "math"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: $${peak_tariff}},
    {key: "offpeak", value: $${offpeak_tariff}},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: $${evoffpeak_tariff}},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: $${superoffpeak_tariff}}
])
getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    return if hour >= 0 and hour < 6 then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if hour >= 11 and hour < 14 then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if hour >= 15 and hour < 21 and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

installDate = time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z")
batteryCost = float(v: $${battery_cost})
daysActive = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: installDate)) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
solarCost = float(v: $${solar_cost})
totalCost = solarCost + batteryCost
solarInstallDate = time(v: "$${solar_install_date}T00:00:00Z")
dataStartDate = time(v: "$${data_start_date}T00:00:00Z")
solarDataDays = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: dataStartDate)) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
solarTotalDays = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: solarInstallDate)) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))

solarSavings = from(bucket: "${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: dataStartDate)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value" and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "entity_id", "_value"])
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["entity_id"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation and exists r.sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        _value: (r.sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation - r.sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)
                + r.sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy * $${feedin_tariff}
    }))
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / solarDataDays) * solarTotalDays}))

battDischarge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: installDate)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        _value: r._value * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)
    }))
    |> sum()

union(tables: [solarSavings, battDischarge])
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / totalCost * 100.0}))

panels.title: Annual Savings Rate
panels.description: Projected annual solar savings based on daily average (battery savings will be added once active)
